---
title: "Jaime Ruiz Serra"
image: img/jaime-blurry-small1.png
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rectangle
  # links:
  #   - text: "{{< iconify academicons google-scholar >}}"
  #     href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=qkmyBJYAAAAJ
  #   # - icon: twitter
  #   - text: "{{< iconify fa6-brands x-twitter >}}"
  #     href: https://twitter.com/JRuizSerra
  #   # - icon: linkedin
  #   - text: "{{< iconify fa6-brands linkedin >}}"
  #     href: https://linkedin.com/in/RuizSerra
  #   # - icon: github
  #   - text: "{{< iconify fa6-brands github >}}"
  #     href: https://github.com/RuizSerra
  #   - icon: envelope-fill
  #     # text: E-mail
  #     href: mailto:jaime.ruizserra@sydney.edu.au
  #   - text: blog
  #     href: /posts
---

I am fascinated by the capacity of collectives to achieve outcomes beyond the reach of isolated individuals. My research investigates the interplay between individual agency and collective dynamics, focusing on how incentives shape this relationship. I draw upon models from cognitive science and computational economics, analysing them through a complex systems framework that incorporates information theory, dynamical systems theory, game theory, and Bayesian inference.

Passionate about empowering individuals equitably and sustainably, I believe that democratizing information and technology, along with fostering local communities, will have the greatest impact toward this goal.

I have studies in robotics and mechatronics engineering, statistics and data science, complex systems, AI. I have experience in deep reinforcement learning and computer vision research. I'm a certified AWS Solutions Architect Associate with several years of industry experience in cloud infrastructure and 10 years of Python expertise in automation, data engineering, and machine learning.


## News

<div class="news-table">
  <table>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td>Jul 2026</td>
        <td>Participating in the 2026 [Human-aligned AI Summer School (HAAISS)](https://humanaligned.ai/2026/)</td>
        <td>Prague, CZ</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Jun 2026<br>Sep 2026</td>
        <td>I will be based in London for the [PIBBSS Fellowship](https://princint.ai/programs/fellowship/)</td>
        <td>London, UK</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Jan 2026</td>
        <td>Attended a symposium on the Great Filter Hypothesis, and collaborated on a ["Algorithmic bottlenecks in evolution" preprint](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.04498) with some participants</td>
        <td>Heron Island, AU</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>May 2025</td>
        <td>Presented Active Inference x Game Theory work at [AAMAS'25](https://www.ifaamas.org/Proceedings/aamas2025/pdfs/p1793.pdf)</td>
        <td>Detroit, US</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>




## Selected Publications

Sweeney P, **Ruiz-Serra J**, Harré MS. Decision, Inference, and Information: Formal Equivalences Under Active Inference. *Entropy*, 2025. [DOI:10.3390/e28010001](https://doi.org/10.3390/e28010001)

**Ruiz-Serra J**, Sweeney P, and Harré MS. Factorised Active Inference for Strategic Multi-Agent Interactions. *AAMAS '25*, Detroit, US, May 2025. [DOI:10.5555/3709347.3743815](https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.5555/3709347.3743815)

**Ruiz-Serra J**, White J, Petrie S, Kameneva T, and McCarthy C. Learning scene representations for human-assistive displays using self-attention networks. *ACM Trans. Multimedia Comput. Commun. Appl.*, 2024. [DOI:10.1145/3650111](https://doi.org/10.1145/3650111)

**Ruiz-Serra J** and Harré MS. Inverse Reinforcement Learning as the Algorithmic Basis for Theory of Mind: Current Methods and Open Problems. *Algorithms*, 2023 (Awarded "Editor's Choice"). [DOI:10.3390/a16020068](https://doi.org/10.3390/a16020068)

**Ruiz-Serra J**, White J, Petrie S, Kameneva T, and McCarthy C. Towards self-attention based visual navigation in the real world. *ACRA '22*, Brisbane, AU, Dec 2022. [arXiv:2209.07043](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2209.07043)

*More on [Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=qkmyBJYAAAAJ)*





## Education

<div class="education-table">
  <table>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td>Oct 2022<br>Present</td>
        <td>The University of Sydney<br><strong>PhD</strong>, <em>Complex Systems and Artificial Intelligence</em></td>
        <td>Sydney, AU</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Mar 2021<br>Nov 2022</td>
        <td>MITx on edX<br><strong>MicroMasters</strong>, <em>Statistics and Data Science</em></td>
        <td>Online</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Feb 2016<br>Dec 2020</td>
        <td>Swinburne University of Technology<br><strong>BEng (Hons)</strong> (4.00 GPA), <em>Robotics and Mechatronics</em></td>
        <td>Melbourne, AU</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Jun 2013<br>May 2014</td>
        <td>CATC Design School<br><strong>DipDes</strong>, <em>Graphic Design</em></td>
        <td>Melborune, AU</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>




## Experience

<div class="experience-table">
  <table>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td>Jun 2026<br>Sep 2026</td>
        <td>[PIBBSS](https://princint.ai/programs/fellowship/), [Principles of Intelligence](https://princint.ai)<br><strong>Research Fellow</strong> ([Cooperative AI Foundation](https://www.cooperativeai.com/) track), <em>AI Safety, Complex Systems</em></td>
        <td>London, UK</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Mar 2025<br>Sep 2025</td>
        <td>Vistra<br><strong>AI Engineer</strong>, <em>Artificial Intelligence, LLMs, RAG, Azure</em></td>
        <td>Sydney, AU</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Feb 2023<br>Nov 2024</td>
        <td>The University of Sydney<br><strong>Teaching Assistant</strong>, <em>Machine Learning, Complex Systems</em></td>
        <td>Sydney, AU</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Sep 2020<br>Jan 2024</td>
        <td>Swinburne University of Technology<br><strong>Research Assistant</strong>, <em>Deep Reinforcement Learning, Computer Vision</em></td>
        <td>Remote / Melbourne, AU</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Jan 2018<br>Sep 2020</td>
        <td>National Australia Bank<br><strong>Analyst, Engineer</strong>, <em>Cloud Infrastructure (AWS)</em></td>
        <td>Remote / Melbourne, AU</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td>Nov 2016<br>Sep 2017</td>
        <td>Youth Without Borders<br><strong>State Staffing Manager</strong>, <em>Spark Engineering Camp</em></td>
        <td>Melbourne, AU</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

*More on [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/ruizserra)*
